verses.text: Tua ciangin Israel mite dingkhia uh a, Jerikho gei Jordan galkhat Moab gam zanglei-ah giahphual a sat uh hi
Israel-te in Amor mite tungah a bawlna khempeuh Zippor' tapa Balak in mu hi
Amaute tam mahmah uh ahih manin Moab mite in tua mite kihta uh a, Israel mite kihtakna hangin Moab mite linggawp uh hi

Moab mite in Midian upate kiangah, “Bawngtal in gamlak lopate a liah bangin hih mite in i kiima om mi khempeuh liaktum mang ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Zippor' tapa Balak, tua hun laitaka Moab kumpipa in

Amaw mite' gam Gun gei Pethor-ah a om Beor' tapa Balaam kiangah kamtaite sawlin, “En in, Egypt panin mihon khat hong paikhia hi. Amaute, lei maitang teng dim khin uh a, keima galkhatah amaute om uh hi

Tu-in hong pai in la, amaute hat lua uh ahih manin hih mite hong samsiatsak in. Tua hi leh amaute zo-in hih gam panin ka hawlkhiazo khading hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh thupha na piak mi in thupha ngahin, na samsiat mi in siatna a ngahna ka thei hi,” cisak hi
Tua ahih ciangin Moab upate leh Midian upate aisaanna man ding tawh kuankhia-in Balaam kiangah pai uh a, Balak' thu ama kiangah sung uh hi
Balaam in amaute kiangah, “Tuzan hih lai-ah giak phot un. Topa in kei tungah hong gen bangin note tungah kong genkik ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Moab uliante Balaam tawh a om uh hi
Balaam kiangah Pasian hong pai-in, “Nang tawh a om hih mite kua ahi hiam?” a ci hi
Balaam in Pasian kiangah, “Zippor' tapa Balak, Moab kumpipa in kei kiangah mi hong sawlin

‘En in, Egypt panin mihon khat hong paikhia a, lei maitang teng dim uh hi. Tu-in hong pai in la, amaute hong samsiatsak in. Tua hi leh amaute do-in ka hawlkhiazo khading hi,’ hong ci hi,” ci-in a gen hi
Pasian in Balaam kiangah, “Amaute na zui kei ding hi. Tua mite thupha a kipia ahih manin na samsia kei ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin zingsangin Balaam tho-in Balak' uliante kiangah, “Na gam uhah ciah un; bang hang hiam cih leh Topa in note kong zuih ding hong phallo hi,” a ci hi
Tua ahih ciangin Moab uliante dingin Balak kiangah ciah uh a, “Balaam in kote hong zui nuamlo hi,” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin Balak in amaute sangin a tamzaw leh a zahtakhuai zaw uliante khatvei sawlkik hi
Amaute zong Balaam kiangah pai-in ama kiangah, “Zippor' tapa Balak in hih bangin ci hi: ‘Kei kiangah nong paina ding bangmah kikol-awksak kei in
bang hang hiam cih leh minphatna lianpi nang kong pia ding a, kei' tunga nong gen peuhpeuh ka hih ding hi. Hong pai in la, hih mite hong samsiatsak in,’ ci hi,” ci-in a gen uh hi

Ahih hangin Balaam in Balak' nasemte kiangah, “Balak in kham leh ngun tawh a kidim ama inn hong pia ding hita leh zong, Topa ka Pasian' thupiakna banah a tamzaw hita leh a tawmzaw hita leh bangmah ka hih thei kei hi
Tu-in kong thum hi; Topa in kei tungah bang hong ci lai ding hiam cih ka theihna dingin tuzan zong hih lai-ah giak phot un,” ci-in a dawng hi
Tua zanin Balaam kiangah Pasian hong pai-in, “Nangmah a sam dingin mite hong pai ahih leh, tho in la amaute zui in. Ahih hangin nang kong sawl teng bek na hih ding hi,” a ci hi.
Tua ahih ciangin zingsangin Balaam tho-in a la tutphah vawhin Moab uliante a zui hi
Ahih hangin amah pai ahih manin Pasian heh a, amah a khaktan dingin Topa' vantung mi in lampi-ah na pang hi. Tu-in a la tungah amah tuang a, a nasemte nih in zong a zui uh hi
Topa' vantung mi in a khutsungah namsau dawhsa tawi-in lampi-ah a ding, a la in mu ahih manin lampi panin pialin gamlakah a pai hi. Balaam in lampi-ah a paikikna dingin a la a sat hi
Tua ciangin leenggui lo kikal, a pang tuakah phung a omna lam kawcikah vantung mi na ding leuleu hi
La in Topa' vantung mi a muh ciangin phung phu a, phungah Balaam' khe nengcip ahih ciangin amah in a la sat kik hi
Tua ciangin Topa' vantung mi na ma pai-in, taklamah ahi a, veilamah ahi zongin kihei theihna ding a omlohna mun kawcik khatah na ding leuleu hi
La in Topa' vantung mi a muh ciangin Balaam' nuai-ah lumsuk hi. Balaam heh mahmah a, a ciangkhut tawh a la a sat hi
Tua ciangin Topa in la pau theisak a, la in Balaam kiangah, “Thumvei dong nong satna dingin nang bang hong cih ka hi hiam?” a ci hi
Balaam in a la kiangah, “Nang in kei nong mawlpihna hang ahi hi. Ka khutah namsau a tawi hi leng ka ut hi. Tua hi leh nang kong that khin ding hi,” a ci hi
La in Balaam' kiangah, “Na khan'tawnin tuni ciangdong na tuan'na na la hilo ka hi hiam? Hih bangin nang hong hih ngei ka hi hiam?” a ci hi. Amah in, “Nong hih ngei kei hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Topa in Balaam' mitte hon'sak a, a khutsungah namsau dawhsa tawh Topa' vantung mi lampi-ah a ding mu ahih manin a lu kunin a boksuk hi
Topa' vantung mi in ama kiangah, “Bang hangin na la thumvei dong sat na hi hiam? En in, hih na khualzinna-ah lungkimlo ka hih manin nang hong pang dingin kong kuankhia hi
La in kei hong mu-in thumvei dong hong pel hi. Hong pel kei leh, tu mahmahin nang hong that khinin na la ka hingsak ding hi,” a ci hi

Tua ciangin Balaam in Topa' vantung mi kiangah, “Kei hong pangin lampi-ah na din'lam theilo ka hih manin ka khial hi. Tua ahih ciangin tu-in ka khualzinna hoihsalo na hih leh ka ciahkik ding hi,” a ci hi
Topa' vantung mi in Balaam kiangah, “Mite zui in; ahih hangin nang kong sawlteng bek na gen ding hi,” a ci hi. Tua ahih ciangin Balaam in Balak' uliante a zuisuak hi.
Balaam' hong paina thu Balak in a zak ciangin, Arnon gun gamgi-in a kizatna dunga om, Moab gamgi gei-a om Ar khuapi ciangah amah a dawn dingin a paikhia hi
Balak in Balaam kiangah, “Nang hong sam ding mi hong sawl hilo ka hi hiam? Bang hangin hong pailo na hi hiam? Nang hong liansak lah ding ka hi hiam?” a ci hi
Balaam in Balak kiangah, “En in, na kiang hong tung ing! Thu khatpeuh ka gen theihna ding vangliatna nei ka hi hiam? Pasian in hong sawl thu bek ka gen ding hi,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin Balaam in Balak zui a, Kiriathhuzoth khua-ah a tung uh hi
Balak in bawngtalte leh tuute tawh biakna pia-in Balaam leh amah tawh a om uliante kiangah a puak hi
A zing ciangin Balak in Balaam samin Bamothbaal munah paipihto hi. Tua lai panin amah in Israel mi a madawk pente galmuh thei hi.
